sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي الْأَطْفَالُ وَقْتًا طَوِيلًا أَمَامَ الشَّاشَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca provode dugo vremena ispred digitalnih ekrana.
sentences.translationEn: Children spend a long time in front of digital screens.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْأَمْرُ قَدْ يُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ وَجَوْدَةِ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ova stvar može utjecati na zdravlje očiju i kvalitetu sna.
sentences.translationEn: This matter might affect eye health and sleep quality.

sentences.arabic: تَنْصَحُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ بِتَحْدِيدِ سَاعَاتِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَاتِفِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Studije savjetuju ograničavanje sati korištenja telefona svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Studies advise limiting the hours of phone use every day.
